note_text: chamber_hash_D shows elevated temperature and pressure anomaly during dep_001 step. candidate investigation needed.
chamber_hash_F CMP endpoint signal degraded. surface_height out of spec by 2.2nm.
wafer_demo_08 and wafer_demo_16 lack frequency and margin data for die_013 to die_020 subset due to early test stop.
die_004 and die_008 confirmed high leakage bins. Edge region hypothesis consistent with etch uniformity variation in chamber_hash_A vs chamber_hash_B.
Core region dies (die_001 to die_003 and die_007) candidate for low_power_compute role under same lot and chamber conditions.
Cross-chamber variation between chamber_hash_A and chamber_hash_B within etch_001 step shows candidate signal. Not yet root cause.
chip_tile_map not yet available for wafer_demo_16. Recovery Compiler intake cannot be set to READY without tile map.
CMP pressure anomaly on chamber_hash_F correlates with bin_code 4 failures on wafer_demo_16. Candidate correlation only.
